description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof covered in gray shingles and beige siding on the exterior walls. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and features a small backyard with a hot tub, patio furniture, and mature trees providing shade. The front of the house includes a driveway leading to a single-car garage, with a blue pickup truck parked outside. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The backyard is accessible through sliding glass doors, and the landscaping includes a mix of paved walkways and green areas. The overall design is practical and inviting, typical of American residential neighborhoods.
description: A beige two-story suburban house with a gray gable roof, fenced backyard, garage, and mature trees. Features include a driveway, hot tub, patio, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the fenced backyard, hot tub, patio area, and two large trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side/rear angle highlighting the backyard patio, hot tub, and sliding glass doors, with the wooden fence enclosing the yard.
description_view_2: Front view with the driveway, blue pickup truck, garage door, and main entrance visible, framed by trees.
description_view_3: Angled front view showing the driveway, garage, main entry, and a clear view of the two-story window arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with a small overhang, concrete steps, and adjacent garage entry; no porch or columns.
